testcase.name: test_enhancements
testcase.failure:
self = <test_styles.TestStyles testMethod=test_enhancements>
def setUp(self): with open("styles.json", "r", encoding="utf-8") as file: self.styles: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = json.load(file) with open("enhancements.json", "r", encoding="utf-8") as file: self.enhancements: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = json.load(file) > self.model_reference: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = get_github_json_file( "https://api.github.com/repos/Haidra-Org/AI-Horde-image-model-reference/contents/stable_diffusion.json" )
tests/test_styles.py:32: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
url = 'https://api.github.com/repos/Haidra-Org/AI-Horde-image-model-reference/contents/stable_diffusion.json'
def get_github_json_file(url: str) -> dict[str, Any]: response = treq.get(url, headers={"Accept": "application/vnd.github.raw+json"}) > response.raise_for_status() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'raise_for_status'
tests/test_styles.py:12: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_styles
testcase.failure:
self = <test_styles.TestStyles testMethod=test_styles>
def setUp(self): with open("styles.json", "r", encoding="utf-8") as file: self.styles: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = json.load(file) with open("enhancements.json", "r", encoding="utf-8") as file: self.enhancements: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = json.load(file) > self.model_reference: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = get_github_json_file( "https://api.github.com/repos/Haidra-Org/AI-Horde-image-model-reference/contents/stable_diffusion.json" )
